title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Key Exchange
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Sabo, Dadan, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #3, Franky, Unknown person #12 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Dadan, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #3, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: It is filled with mountains of garbage.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Fires started by the sun spew smoke.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: I see. Well, so did I!!

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: How did you get this much money!?

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Daaann, you beat me today too.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Shut it, quick. Someone might see it...

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Are you guys gonna be Pirates!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ace, you come out here every day?

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: He found out about our secret...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What're you talking about? You do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I heard voices from the forest!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Dadan, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #3, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: key exchange.
